Audit Standards

The QuickFinCalc Mission

Quick Financial Calculator (QuickFinCalc) was built on a simple premise: financial tools should be professional, precise, and instantly accessible. We remove the complexity of spreadsheets and the uncertainty of unverified online tools.

Whether you are calculating a complex mortgage amortization, evaluating a business investment (ROI), or planning for tax season, our calculators provide the accuracy required by auditors with the speed required by modern life.

Why Trust Our Tools?

🛡️
Data Sovereignty
Your financial data stays with you. All calculations run locally in your browser.
🔍
Auditor Verified
Formulas are cross-referenced against international accounting and banking standards.
🚀
Zero Friction
No accounts, no paywalls, and no pop-up ads. Just pure financial utility.
📊
Business Focused
Specifically optimized for business owners, students, and financial analysts.

The Developer

QuickFinCalc is designed and maintained by a financial professional who understands the importance of precise data in decision-making.

MI
Md. Merajul Islam
Internal Audit Professional

Leveraging audit experience to build tools that meet professional standards, ensuring every calculation provides a reliable foundation for your financial goals.
